name: wayang
description: wayang - wayang-themed Claude Code plugins by ecowangsa. Hosts Dalang (a phased-SDLC executor) and Punakawan (an advisory panel). Dalang depends on Punakawan; installing dalang@wayang pulls punakawan automatically.

plugins.name: dalang
plugins.description: Phased-SDLC executor: idea -> release across six phases (Discovery, Design, Build, QA, Security, Docs/Release) with iterative loop-backs and hard human commit gates. One model, many roles - honest by design, not a team of independent reviewers. Invoked as /dalang:sdlc. Experimental (v0.1.x).

plugins.name: punakawan
plugins.description: Advisory panel: distinct wayang-character lenses debate a hard call and return one synthesized Semar verdict with a certainty band. Invoked as /punakawan:panel. (Dalang's Phase-0 contested-direction gate and Phase-1 threat model call it.)
